title: Deep Prasad's theory that UFOs are part of a cellular automaton guiding society.
summary: Deep Prasad presents his theory that UAP sightings are not random isolated events but part of a larger cellular automaton system, where a more intelligent organism is guiding human society toward a complex emergent state we have not yet achieved.

acronyms.definition: Term used to describe unidentified flying objects or aerial sightings

key_claims.claim: UAP sightings are part of a cellular automata system where individually strange events contribute to a larger emergent pattern
Humanity is part of a more intelligent organism's cellular automata game
The purpose of this system is to push human society toward a complex emergent state that we have not yet achieved
